meta.produkt: 5w1 glosnik indukcyjny z ladowarka (5-in-1 Bluetooth phone-stand + wireless charger + speaker + RGB light), wariant CZARNY
meta.wzorzec: TikTok 24.3M plays - UGC reakcja + hands-POV; kondensacja do 15s wg SSOT 0c: ciecie gadania/intro, jedna idea (5w1 mechanizm), 6 ciec, ujecia <=2.8s
meta.silniki: wszystkie sceny flf (Kling 2.5 first+last), zero omnihuman/mc (brak twarzy) - playbook gadzet-handsPOV sekcja 2
meta.bramki_tomka: self-accept jako agent-operator (retro-akceptacja delegowana); realna bramka = qa_gate per klip

scenes.frame_first: MACRO hero on a dark modern desk: the black 5-in-1 device front-center-right, its RGB edge-light OFF/dim, a fingertip approaching the top edge, moody dark desk with faint blue ambient, mechanical keyboard blurred behind left
scenes.frame_last: SAME framing and product: the RGB edge-light now BLOOMS fully alive in a magenta-to-cyan gradient glow, the fingertip just touching the top edge, glow spills onto the desk
scenes.motion: the fingertip taps the top edge and the RGB edge-light blooms to life from dim to bright, subtle handheld micro-drift, slow, no full rotation

scenes.frame_first: The glowing black device on the dark desk, a hand entering top of frame lowering a smartphone toward the front lip of the stand
scenes.frame_last: SAME device and desk: the smartphone now rests upright in the front lip against the glowing panel, screen softly lit with a generic dark UI, RGB rim glowing around it
scenes.motion: the hand lowers the phone and seats it upright on the stand lip, gentle, phone settles under gravity, subtle handheld micro-drift

scenes.frame_first: CLOSE on the seated phone against the glowing black panel, RGB rim bright, a faint concentric wireless-charging ripple starting at the contact point, shallow depth of field
scenes.frame_last: SAME close framing: the RGB rim has shifted hue along the gradient and pulses brighter, the charging ripple expands softly, phone screen still a blurred dark music UI
scenes.motion: the device and the phone stay COMPLETELY STILL and rigid, mounted on the stand; ONLY the RGB edge-light slowly shifts hue from magenta toward cyan and pulses gently, and a faint soft light ring expands once on the desk; absolutely no rotation, no tilting, no movement or morphing of the device or phone, no floating objects, no icons or numbers appearing
scenes.vo_pl: Laduje bezprzewodowo i gra jak glosnik.

scenes.frame_first: Three-quarter FRONT view of the glowing black device on the desk, a hand gripping the base beginning to rotate it, phone not in frame
scenes.frame_last: The device rotated about 80 degrees to show its BACK: a round mesh speaker grille and a row of tiny top-edge buttons now face camera, RGB rim still glowing at the edges
scenes.motion: the hand slowly rotates the device about 80 degrees revealing the rear mesh speaker grille, SLOW partial turn, no full spin, rigid body stays sharp

scenes.frame_first: Hero wide-ish shot: the black device glowing on the dark desk with the smartphone seated and charging, magenta-cyan RGB bounce on the desktop, cozy premium desk vibe
scenes.frame_last: SAME hero shot with a slow subtle push-in, RGB glow a touch brighter, everything else identical
scenes.motion: very slow gentle push-in (dolly) on the glowing device and phone, subtle handheld micro-drift, no rotation
scenes.vo_pl: Podstawka, glosnik i lampka - w jednym.

scenes.frame_first: The glowing black device hero on the dark desk, a fingertip resting on the chrome side knob
scenes.frame_last: SAME framing: the fingertip has turned the chrome knob slightly and the RGB glow brightens in response, alive final hero
scenes.motion: the fingertip turns the chrome side knob a little and the RGB glow responds by brightening, the knob rotates in place, subtle handheld micro-drift

consistency.produkt: identyczny czarny korpus, kwadratowa glowka z obwodka RGB magenta->cyan, JEDNO chromowane pokretlo, trojkatna podstawka, z tylu okragla kratka glosnika (funkcje wg KARTA.functional_count) - w KAZDEJ scenie
consistency.scenografia: to samo ciemne biurko z klawiatura w tle przez calosc; zero kuchni/granitu/cytryny (to wzorzec, nie nasza scena)
consistency.kolor: korpus CZARNY we wszystkich scenach (zakaz bialego wariantu)
consistency.tekst: zero czytelnych napisow/logo na urzadzeniu i telefonie (ekran = rozmyte generyczne UI)

audio.vo: ElevenLabs PL, spokojny pewny meski/neutralny glos, krotkie linie na startach scen hook/charge/hero/cta
audio.muzyka: Stable Audio 2.5 - chill lo-fi electronic desk-setup groove ~15s z narastaniem i lekkim dropem na bloom RGB (~1.5s) i reveal glosnika (~8s)
